successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveRequest and CreateLeaveRequestDto interfaces with all specified attributes
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveRepository interface with create, findById, findByEmployeeId, and updateStatus methods referencing correct types
PostgresLeaveRequestRepository concrete implementation exists with all interface methods implemented
Vitest unit tests exist at tests/unit/modules/leave/leave.repository.test.ts verifying repository interface methods
SQL schema for leave_requests table matches the canonical definition exactly

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Dependency direction: leave -> employee, leave -> policy, leave -> balance, and leave -> notification
LeaveRequest lifecycle states are Pending, Approved, and Rejected
Use TypeScript, Node.js 20, Fastify, PostgreSQL, React Native, npm, and Vitest
